options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -opt_activity_refresh_args
options.description: Specify the list of setStim options to be passed for Joules Xreplay. Call "setOptMode -activity_refresh_args help" to get detailed usage.

options.name: -opt_add_always_on_feed_through_buffers
options.description: Activates adding Always On Feed Thru buffers

options.name: -opt_add_insts
options.description: Enables adding of new instances

options.name: -opt_new_inst_prefix
options.description: Prefix string for name of new instances

options.name: -opt_new_net_prefix
options.description: Prefix string for name of new nets

options.name: -opt_add_ports
options.description: Enables adding ports for optimal buffering

options.name: -opt_all_end_points
options.description: Enables the all end points optimization mode

options.name: -opt_allow_multi_bit_on_flop_with_sdc
options.description: allow merge or split works on flops which have SDC

options.name: -opt_allow_only_cell_swapping
options.description: Forces the post route optimization to perform only same-size Vth swapping for timing improvements

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_merge_bank_label_inference
options.description: Enables soft merging of flops with the same bank label

options.name: -opt_consider_routing_congestion
options.description: Enables routing congestion check at the postRoute stage during optimization of setup, hold, drv, & glitch. It also impacts postCTS hold fixing.

options.name: -opt_clone_insts_list
options.description: list of instance list

options.name: -opt_delete_insts
options.description: Enables instance deletion on all paths

options.name: -opt_add_repeater_report_failure_reason
options.description: To enable printing detailed failure reason report file for addRepeaterByRule

options.name: -opt_detail_drv_failure_reason
options.description: To enable printing detailed drv failure reason report file

options.name: -opt_detail_drv_failure_reason_max_num_nets
options.description: Specify how many violating nets printed

options.name: -opt_down_size_insts
options.description: Enables instance downsizing

options.name: -opt_drv_margin
options.description: Used for scaling maxCap/maxTran constraints

options.name: -opt_early_hold_fixing
options.description: set the ideal or propagaged clock mode for hold fixing in preCTS

options.name: -opt_enable_clock_pulse_width_checks
options.description: Fix and honor pulse width check violations

options.name: -opt_enable_podv2_clock_opt_flow
options.description: enable PodV2 and clock_opt_design flow

options.name: -opt_enable_targeted_synthesis
options.description: Enable targeted synthesis mode

options.name: -opt_post_route_fix_clock_drv
options.description: enables DRV fixing on clock net

options.name: -opt_drv
options.description: Enables fixing maxCap/maxTran violations on constrained nets

options.name: -opt_fix_fanout_load
options.description: Enables fixing fanOut load violations

options.name: -opt_post_route_fix_glitch
options.description: Enables glitch fixing in AAE flow

options.name: -opt_hold_allow_overlap
options.description: Enables hold optimization to insert cells with overlaps when inadequate free space is available. The placement will then be legalized before ECO routing.

options.name: -opt_hold_allow_resize
options.description: Enables the resizing capability inside hold optimization.

options.name: -opt_hold_allow_setup_tns_degradation
options.description: Allows setup total negative slack to degrade during hold optimization.

options.name: -opt_hold_on_excluded_clock_nets
options.description: Do hold fixing on the excluded clock nets

options.name: -opt_post_route_fix_si_transitions
options.description: Enables sislew fixing in AAE flow

options.name: -opt_high_effort_cells
options.description: Provide a list of cells to be used for high effort optimization. Dont-use and Dont-touch constraints for these cells will be ignored for high effort optimization.

options.name: -opt_hold_cells
options.description: Provide a list of buffer & delay cells to be used for hold buffering. The dont_use constraints for these cells will be ignored.

options.name: -opt_hold_slack_threshold
options.description: Specifies slack threshold value beyond which the hold timing violations will not be fixed

options.name: -opt_hold_target_slack
options.description: Specifies target slack value (in nano secs) for hold timing optimization

options.name: -opt_honor_density_screen
options.description: Control density screen

options.name: -opt_honor_fences
options.description: Specifies that the timing optimization takes fences constraints into account. Placement of cells will be legalized within each fence.

options.name: -opt_hold_ignore_path_groups
options.description: Specifies path groups to be excluded in hold timing optimization

options.name: -opt_leakage_to_dynamic_ratio
options.description: relative effort for leakage and dynamic power optimization in the range [0.0 - 1.0]

options.name: -opt_max_density
options.description: Specifies maximum area utilization

options.name: -opt_max_length
options.description: Enables max length constraints in optDesign

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_merge_timing_effort
options.description: Timing effort level for MBFF merging

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_split_timing_effort
options.description: Timing effort level for MBFF splitting

options.name: -opt_move_insts
options.description: Enables moving instances while fixing setup violations

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_combinational_merge_timing_effort
options.description: Specifies the timing effort level for multibit combinational merging

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_combinational_mode
options.description: Enables the user specific multi bit combination cell merge and split based on area and power

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_combinational_opt
options.description: enables or disables the multi-bit combinational optimization flow

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_combinational_split_timing_effort
options.description: Specifies the timing effort level for multibit combinational splitting

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_name_prefix
options.description: User to specify multi bit flop name prefix

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_name_separator
options.description: User to specify flop merge and split name separator

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_name_suffix
options.description: User to specify multi bit flop name suffix, For example: _FF

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_opt
options.description: specifies multi bit flop merge/split opt

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_reorder_bits
options.description: Enable Swap MBFF bits to take advantage of mixed-drving stength cells. false: Disable; true: enable for timing and power optimization; timing: enable for timing optimization; power: enable for power optimization.

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_unused_bit_count
options.description: specifies how many maximum unused bits to be allowed in each multibit cell

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_unused_bits
options.description: specifies whether a mapped multibit instance can have one or more unused bits

options.name: -opt_pre_route_ndr_aware
options.description: Provide a list of NDR names that will be used NDR-based optimization

options.name: -opt_one_pass_lec
options.description: Set options one pass lec opt support

options.name: -opt_duplicate_cte_constrained_hport
options.description: allow buffering to duplicate hterms/hports with CTE constraints.

options.name: -opt_icg_enable_pin_rebuffering
options.description: Rebuffer nets to enable pin of ICG instances after clock tree insertion

options.name: -opt_report_multi_bit_unmerged_reasons
options.description: When enabled, the reasons for unmerged multibit flops/latches will be printed in the MBFF summary

options.name: -opt_constant_inputs
options.description: Force optimization of instances with constant inputs, even if it worsens objective gain

options.name: -opt_constant_nets
options.description: Enables optimization of constant nets

options.name: -opt_resize_flip_flops
options.description: Enables FF resizing

options.name: -opt_tied_inputs
options.description: Force optimization of instances with inputs tied together, even if it worsens objective gain

options.name: -opt_podv2_flow_effort
options.description: Effort level for PodV2 flow

options.name: -opt_post_route_allow_overlap
options.description: Enables postRoute optimization to insert cells with overlaps when inadequate free space is available. The placement will then be legalized before ECO routing.

options.name: -opt_post_route_area_reclaim
options.description: To enable area reclaim in postRoute optimization

options.name: -opt_post_route_check_antenna_rules
options.description: Allows optimization to check/ignore antenna rules in lefsafe swaps

options.name: -opt_post_route_drv_recovery
options.description: Enables postRoute drv recovery in GigaOpt.

options.name: -opt_post_route_setup_recovery
options.description: Enables postRoute SI setup timing recovery in GigaOpt.

options.name: -opt_power_effort
options.description: Effort level for power aware mode in optimization

options.name: -opt_preserve_all_sequential
options.description: Preserve sequential element during the simplify netlist optimization step

options.name: -opt_preserve_hpin_function
options.description: Enables preserving logical functions at hierarchical ports

options.name: -opt_area_recovery
options.description: Enables area reclamation step

options.name: -opt_multi_bit_flop_split_report_failure_reason
options.description: To enable printing split failure reasons

options.name: -opt_resize_power_switch_insts
options.description: Enables resizing of power switch instances during optimization

options.name: -opt_resize_level_shifter_and_iso_insts
options.description: Enables resizing of shifters and isolation instances

options.name: -opt_enable_restructure
options.description: Enables netlist restructuring

options.name: -opt_sequential_genus_restructure_report_failure_reason
options.description: To enable printing SeqCRR failure reasons

options.name: -opt_setup_target_slack
options.description: Specifies target slack value (in nano secs) for setup timing optimization

options.name: -opt_area_recovery_setup_target_slack
options.description: Specifies target slack value (in nano secs) for area and power reclaim during setup timing optimization

options.name: -opt_flop_pins_report
options.description: print full hierarchical flop pins names for flops deleted in simplifyNetlist

options.name: -opt_flops_report
options.description: print full hierarchical flop names for flops deleted in simplifyNetlist

options.name: -opt_remove_redundant_insts
options.description: Enables simplifying the netlist during optimization

options.name: -opt_pin_swapping
options.description: Enables pin swapping

options.name: -opt_target_based_opt_file
options.description: Target based opt input file

options.name: -opt_target_based_opt_file_only
options.description: Use data from target based opt file for optimization

options.name: -opt_target_based_opt_hold_file
options.description: Target based opt input file for hold

options.name: -opt_time_design_compress_reports
options.description: save reports in compressed format

options.name: -opt_time_design_expanded_view
options.description: To report expanded views in timeDesign

options.name: -opt_time_design_num_paths
options.description: Report specified number of paths in timeDesign

options.name: -opt_time_design_report_net
options.description: To report net delays in timeDesign

options.name: -opt_time_design_vertical_timing_summary
options.description: Prints vertical timing summary after time_design and final summary report

options.name: -opt_unfix_clock_insts
options.description: Enables unfixing clock instances flow

options.name: -opt_concatenate_default_and_user_prefixes
options.description: Enables combining default prefix for instances(nets) with the prefix specified by -opt_new_inst_prefix(-opt_new_net_prefix)

options.name: -opt_skew
options.description: Enables triggering the skewClock command from within optDesign

options.name: -opt_skew_ccopt
options.description: Effort for useful skew optimization within ccopt_design

options.name: -opt_skew_post_route
options.description: Enables useful skew optimization during postRoute timing optimization.

options.name: -opt_skew_pre_cts
options.description: Enables useful skew optimization during preCTS timing optimization.

options.name: -opt_verbose
options.description: Enables verbose information logging

options.name: -opt_post_route_art_flow
options.description: Enables optimizing the top-level interface logic for a hierarchical floorplan

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
